care.summary: Small but extremely hot chili pepper; thrives in warm tropical conditions.
care.water: Moderate; allow topsoil to dry slightly between waterings
care.soil: Well-drained, slightly acidic soil with organic matter
care.fertilizer: Balanced fertilizer monthly during growing season
care.toxicity: Fruit is edible but very hot; avoid contact with eyes
tips: Harvest when fruits turn red for maximum heat
